name: Almond Fried Ice Cream B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the ice cream in advance and return it to the freezer until extremely hard.
2. Heat the cooking oil in a deep-fryer.
3. Roll each ice-cream ball first in the tangerine sauce, then in the sliced almonds, coating thoroughly.
4. Deep-fry for a few seconds only.
5. Serve immediately.
